title: chicken mcnuggets
description:
replaces gold with chicken mcnuggets.
a gold ingot is now a box, nuggets are nuggets themselves.
(nugget's texture is from Terraria, i've only added one filter)
body:
this is a resource pack about chicken mcnuggets.

a gold ingot is now the box, nugget - nugget.

nugget texture is nugget from Terraria with lower saturation.




once in a summer night i thought:
"i need a chicken mcnuggets resource pack."
(i don't know, why exactly in 0:30 AM i wanted to do this)
